title: Demande d'adhésion de Chypre  à l'OEPP

pages.text:
C RE

A H"

REPUBLIC A OF CYPRUS

No 4635/Bo4/1 7 octobe 1961.

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

5 October 1961

Excellency:

I have the honour to refer to the letter from the Director-General of the European and

Mediterranean Plant Protection Organization dated 17th day, 1961, addressed to the winistry of

Agriculture and Natural Resources of the Govern- ment of Cyprus, extending an invitation on behalf of the council to the Cyprus Government to Join the

Organization as a member, by virtue of the provisions

Of Article III Of the Convention and to hereby notify you of my Government's acceptance to become party to the Convention of the luropean and

Mediterranean Plant Protection Organization.

Accept, Sir, the assurances of my highest consideration.

Eittyprianou (Spyros Kypriarou)

Minister of Foreign Affairs

lis Excellency

Che Foreion Minister the Government of the

Republic of France.
